allow:
Bash(aws dynamodb query \\
  --table-name life-platform \\
  --key-condition-expression "pk = :pk AND sk BETWEEN :start AND :end" \\
  --expression-attribute-values '{":pk":{"S":"USER#matthew#SOURCE#whoop"},":start":{"S":"DATE#2025"},":end":{"S":"DATE#2026-99"}}' \\
  --scan-index-forward false \\
  --limit 1 \\
  --region us-west-2 \\
  --query "Items[0].sk.S" \\
  --output text)

Bash(\\
S3_BUCKET=matthew-life-platform DYNAMODB_TABLE=life-platform AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-west-2 \\
python3 -c "
from unittest.mock import patch
import os

mock_cm = {'date': '2026-03-20', 'tsb': -2.5, 'hrv_7d': 48.3, 'hrv_30d': 51.2, 'readiness_score': 65.0, 'readiness_colour': 'YELLOW'}
mock_whoop = [{'date': '2026-03-20', 'recovery_score': 72, 'hrv': 48.3, 'resting_heart_rate': 52, 'sleep_duration_hours': 7.5}]
mock_garmin = [{'date': '2026-03-20', 'body_battery_end': 68}]

import mcp.config
with patch\('mcp.core.query_source'\) as mock_qs, patch\('mcp.core.get_profile', return_value={}\):
    def side_effect\(source, start, end, lean=False\):
        if source == 'computed_metrics': return [mock_cm]
        if source == 'whoop': return mock_whoop
        if source == 'garmin': return mock_garmin
        return []
    mock_qs.side_effect = side_effect
    from mcp.tools_health import tool_get_readiness_score
    result = tool_get_readiness_score\({'date': '2026-03-20'}\)
    print\('readiness_score:', result.get\('readiness_score'\)\)
    print\('label:', result.get\('label'\)\)
    tf = result.get\('components', {}\).get\('training_form', {}\)
    print\('training_form.source:', tf.get\('raw', {}\).get\('source', 'MISSING'\)\)
    hrv = result.get\('components', {}\).get\('hrv_trend', {}\)
    print\('hrv_trend.source:', hrv.get\('raw', {}\).get\('source', 'MISSING'\)\)
    pc = result.get\('_precomputed_cross_check'\)
    print\('cross-check.readiness_score:', pc.get\('readiness_score'\) if pc else 'absent'\)
    print\('total DynamoDB calls:', mock_qs.call_count\)
    print\('sources:', [c.args[0] for c in mock_qs.call_args_list]\)
")

Bash(S3_BUCKET=matthew-life-platform USER_ID=matthew DYNAMODB_TABLE=life-platform AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-west-2 \\
python3 -c "
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock

mock_whoop_7d = [{'date': '2026-03-20', 'recovery_score': 72, 'hrv': 48.3, 'resting_heart_rate': 52, 'sleep_duration_hours': 7.5}]
mock_whoop_30d = [{'date': f'2026-02-{d:02d}', 'hrv': 50.0} for d in range\(1, 20\)] + mock_whoop_7d
mock_garmin = [{'date': '2026-03-20', 'body_battery_end': 68}]

with patch\('mcp.core.query_source'\) as mock_qs, patch\('mcp.core.get_profile', return_value={}\):
    def side_effect\(source, start, end, lean=False\):
        if source == 'computed_metrics': return []   # no pre-computed record
        if source == 'whoop': return mock_whoop_30d
        if source == 'garmin': return mock_garmin
        if source == 'strava': return []             # no strava
        return []
    mock_qs.side_effect = side_effect
    from mcp.tools_health import tool_get_readiness_score
    result = tool_get_readiness_score\({'date': '2026-03-20'}\)
    tf = result.get\('components', {}\).get\('training_form', {}\)
    hrv = result.get\('components', {}\).get\('hrv_trend', {}\)
    print\('readiness_score:', result.get\('readiness_score'\)\)
    print\('training_form.source:', tf.get\('raw', {}\).get\('source', 'absent \(no TSB data\)'\)\)
    print\('hrv_trend.source:', hrv.get\('raw', {}\).get\('source', 'absent'\)\)
    print\('total DynamoDB calls:', mock_qs.call_count\)
    print\('sources:', [c.args[0] for c in mock_qs.call_args_list]\)
")
